title: Create: Aquatic Ambitions
description: Introduces new bulk process which allows for more options for Prismarine, Coral and Copper automation!
body: **Create Aquatic Ambitions** is a _Create Mod_ Addon that introduces new machines, processes, and production lines inspired by the ocean. Harness the power of the conduit to transform byproducts into valuable resources and building blocks — and make more materials renewable in the process! **Features:** - **Conduit Channeling:** A new fan processing type which uses am active conduit as the catalyst - **Conduit Cage:** a machine used for granting/removing effects and also simplyifying chanelling setups. - **Guardianless Prismarine**: Channeling Flint has a chance to give you prismarine shards! - **Fully Renewable Copper**: Now obtainable from prismarine! Shoutout to @DubbEck for the original recipes! - **Coral Revival and Farming**: Dead coral can be revived via channeling and harvested with harvesters. - **Sponge Duping**: Dry sponges can be channeled for a chance to obtain extras - **Easier Nautilus**: Nautilus Shells can be obtained from Limestone - **Craftable Tridents**: Use Spiky shells and prismarine alloy rods to get the sea's most powerful weapon! - **Ponder**: The Conduit and Conduit Cage have ponders to explain all their uses **Compatibility:** - Upgrade Aquatic Integration for coral recipes - JEI Integration for all recipes - CAA 2.0.0 or above are only compatible with Create 6.0.6 or above **Future Plans:** - Add Copperback Enchantments - Add Power Generation via Water Turbines - **No plans to backport this to 1.19.2 or futher back** Shoutout to @DakotaPride, @IThundxr and many others from #dev in Create's discord for the coding help. Shoutout to Dejojotheawsome for featuring my mod in one of his videos
